name: murphtournaments-discord-bot

scripts.test: node -r ts-node/register/transpile-only apps/bot/storage/standings.test.ts && node -r ts-node/register/transpile-only apps/bot/helpers/branding.test.ts && node -r ts-node/register/transpile-only apps/bot/helpers/permissions.test.ts && node -r ts-node/register/transpile-only apps/bot/helpers/bracketPanel.test.ts
scripts.prisma:migrate:local: npm run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.prisma:setup: npm run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm run prisma:generate

description: Murph Tournaments Discord bot for THE FINALS tournament operations.
